calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ulises Pizano-Diaz for and with Donkor Taue (Petitioner).

Mr. Diaz stated that they have not heard from anyone who is objecting and that they found the original will. The Court instructed Counsel to file the original will. The Court granted the Petition for Probate Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-31-2017 Continued To Aug-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-17-2017 Continued To Jul-31-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
